channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: iOS 26.4 Beta Adds End-to-End Encryption for iPhone-to-Android RCS Texts - MacRumors
item.description:
1. iOS 26.4 Beta Adds End-to-End Encryption for iPhone-to-Android RCS Texts  MacRumors
  2. Google, Apple start testing encrypted RCS on Android and iOS 26.4  9to5Google
  3. iOS 26.4 makes two app updates that bring back iOS 18 designs  9to5Mac
  4. Apple’s iOS 26.4 arrives in public beta with AI music playlists, video podcasts, and more  TechCrunch
  5. iPhone users can test encrypted RCS texts to Android in iOS 26.4 beta 2  AppleInsider

item.title: This One Gameplay Video Is Marathon’s Biggest Selling Point So Far - Forbes
item.description:
1. This One Gameplay Video Is Marathon’s Biggest Selling Point So Far  Forbes
  2. Marathon Open Beta: How To Get In, What To Expect, And PS Plus Bonuses  GameSpot
  3. Marathon isn't just favouring PlayStation players with exclusive cosmetics; Xbox and Steam players promised bonus loot, too  Eurogamer
  4. Marathon Server Slam start date, rewards, and how to get in  VG247
  5. Bellevue-based Bungie revives 'Marathon' game as modern extraction shooter, citing AI themes and survival roots  king5.com

item.title: Xbox sale round-up February 24, 2026 - TrueAchievements
item.description:
1. Xbox sale round-up February 24, 2026  TrueAchievements
  2. Popular Xbox Games Drop To Their 'Lowest Price Ever' In New ID@Xbox Multiplayer Sale  Pure Xbox
  3. Weekend Console Download Deals for Feb. 13: Xbox Lunar New Year Sale  Shacknews
  4. Big Game Discounts Across All Platforms  GodisaGeek.com
  5. Last chance to save over $100 on bundle of fantastic games in Xbox sale  TrueAchievements

item.title: FreeBSD doesn't have Wi-Fi driver for my old MacBook, so AI built one for me - Hacker News
item.description: FreeBSD doesn't have Wi-Fi driver for my old MacBook, so AI built one for me  Hacker News
